description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
